description: Kavach - AI-powered DPDPA 2023 compliance platform. Highly technical, data-dense 'Command Center' aesthetic. Focuses on structural clarity, explicit grid lines, and high-contrast alert states against a deep void background.

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-[240px] fixed inset-y-0 left-0 bg-[#0D1117] border-r border-[#30363D] z-50 flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.header: h-16 border-b border-[#30363D] bg-[#0D1117]/80 backdrop-blur-xl sticky top-0 z-40 flex items-center px-6
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Use tight spacing (gap-4, gap-6) for data density, but generous internal padding for cards (p-6) to maintain readability.

surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders (Technical Look). bg-[#161B22] border border-[#30363D] rounded-lg shadow-none. Left accent bar heavily utilized (border-l-4) to denote risk or status.
surface_strategies.modals_dialogs: bg-[#161B22] border border-[#30363D] backdrop-blur-2xl shadow-2xl shadow-black/50

buttons.primary: bg-[#58A6FF] hover:bg-[#408BE0] text-[#0D1117] font-semibold transition-colors px-4 py-2 rounded-md
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#30363D] text-[#E6EDF3] hover:bg-[#1C2333] hover:text-[#58A6FF] transition-all px-4 py-2 rounded-md
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF6B6B]/10 border border-[#FF6B6B]/50 text-[#FF6B6B] hover:bg-[#FF6B6B] hover:text-[#0D1117]

badges.critical: bg-[#FF6B6B]/10 text-[#FF6B6B] border border-[#FF6B6B]/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono
badges.high: bg-[#F79B43]/10 text-[#F79B43] border border-[#F79B43]/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono
badges.medium: bg-[#BC8CFF]/10 text-[#BC8CFF] border border-[#BC8CFF]/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono
badges.low: bg-[#3DDC97]/10 text-[#3DDC97] border border-[#3DDC97]/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono

tables.header: border-b border-[#30363D] text-[#8B949E] text-xs uppercase tracking-wider bg-[#161B22]

charts.styling: Use grid lines with #30363D. Tooltips must be bg-[#1C2333] border border-[#30363D] shadow-lg. Use risk_tier colors for bar/pie charts to map explicitly to data risk.
charts.gauge: Custom Recharts RadialBarChart or specialized SVG gauge for DPDPA Compliance Score. Center text should be large font-mono.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle border color shifts (border-[#30363D] to border-[#8B949E] or border-[#58A6FF]).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Fast and snappy. transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use mono-spaced text 'LOADING...' or a minimalist linear progress bar rather than a generic spinner.

media_and_icons.icon_library: lucide-react (for general UI), react-icons/si (for brand logos like AWS, MongoDB).
media_and_icons.icon_style: 1.5px stroke width. Strict mapping of colors to context (e.g., Shield Alert icon is #FF6B6B).

user_avatar.description: Professional user avatar for top right header profile.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Install icon libraries: 'yarn add lucide-react react-icons'.

Use standard Shadcn UI primitives but strictly override their default styles using the hex codes provided above. Shadcn uses CSS variables by default; map them to these exact hex colors in tailwind.config.js or globals.css.
The 240px Left Sidebar must be fixed. Do not hide it on desktop. Add 'pt-16 pl-[240px]' to main content to offset the fixed sidebar and header.
Implement the 72-Hour DPBI Countdown Clock in the Breach Sentinel using a monospace font and the 'danger' or 'critical' badge styling if time is low.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-security', data-testid='connect-datasource-btn').
For the Data Sources module, use Simple Icons (react-icons/si) for databases (SiMongodb, SiPostgresql, SiAmazonaws, etc.).
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Stick to the specified typography.
